comments: Approved. The contract scope is correctly bounded to generating only tasks/v0.7-m3-b-self-repair-model.md, and both the contract and recon packet align on the required design-only outcome: the document must answer the six mandatory governance questions covering automatic vs. independently approved actions, prevention of silent self-modification, auditability, anti-rubber-stamp review controls, and the boundary between retry behavior and escalated problem patterns. The out_of_scope clause is also appropriately restrictive and consistent with repository governance: it forbids implementation of unapproved self-modification logic, rewriting governance/review/gatekeeper mechanisms, executing .agent-state/ migrations, performing environment adaptations, and modifying active workflow state models such as workflow/dispatch.json or iteration-state.json. Allowed files, required outputs, and stop conditions reinforce a design-only phase with no authorization to expand into runtime or state-model changes.
